l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide banking services, including retail and corporate banking activities, as well as all other services provided by banks.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing banking services which cannot be mapped to remaining themes, For eg:  RBI, other central bank activities which are not related to traditional rtil, corporate and investment banking services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes businesses that provide banking services to individuals. These services can include checking and saving accounts, personal loans, credit cards, mortgages, or other financial products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in offering banking services to individuals. These services can include checking and saving accounts, personal loans, credit cards, mortgages or other financial products. Also if in description, wealth management is also given with Retail banking ie. wealth management for retail customers only, then we will consider it as Retail banking only.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer banking services to business clients. These services can include current accounts, corporate loans, or any other services provided to help businesses grow.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in offering banking services to business clients. These services can include current account, corporate loans or any services provided to help businesses grow.Also if in description, wealth management is also given with corporate banking, i.e. wealth management for corporate customers only then we will consider it as corporate banking only.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that assist with advisory-based financial transactions on behalf of individuals or corporations. It also assists companies involved in mergers and acquisitions (M&A) and provides ancillary services such as market making, derivatives trading, and equity securities trading.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing investment banking services such as IPO underwriting, merger/acquisition and its advisory services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in banking activities, as well as wealth and asset management services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing retail, corporate banking services along with wealth & asset managemen t services and bifurcation is not available.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that engage in banking activities as well as provide insurance services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in banking activities along with insurance underwriting services (or insurance brokerage services along with insurance underwriting ) and proper bifurcation among these activities is not given. If providing only insurance brokerage services i.e. if the insurance products are not of the bank or its subsidiary and and it acts as a mediator to sell these products for other insurance company then it will  not be mapped to this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in investment banking activities along with brokerage services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing investment banking along with securities brokerage services will be mapped to this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in investment banking activities along with corporate banking services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing retail, corporate and investment banking services and revenue bifurcation is not available among the three.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in banking services encompassing both retail and corporate banking activities, such as those serving community, consumer, and business segments, and provide lending and deposit solutions tailored to individuals and small to mid-sized businesses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing retail and corporate banking services to both institutions and individuals and no bifurcation is available. Retail banking includes providing savings a/c deposit and withdrawal servies, granting loans to individuals, cheque book and passbook services, credit cards etc.Corporate banking activities include granting loans to instituitions and providing current a/c services, commercial paper, treasury bills, foreign exchange services, credit gurantee services, fund management for corporates etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are banks and also provide leasing services, either as a business or through a subsidiary.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies which are banks and also providing leasing service either as a business or through a subsidiary( any financial institution) will be covered under this segment. the AR name for this type of company is generally given as " equipment leasing" ," bank leasing" or " leasing",  don't confuse it with companies that are actually leasing their machinery or equipment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in both IB and asset management activities.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in both investment banking and asset & wealth management services and revenue bifurcation is not given. Investment banking services refer to providing merger/acquisition and its advsory services, IPO underwriting services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes businesses that provide financial services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing a wide range of financial services in a single segment and cannot be mapped to any other theme such as banking, insurance, brokerage, wealth and asset management, financial leasing etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide capital to commercial and consumer borrowers outside of the traditional banking system.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing a variety of loans to individuals and businesses outside the traditional banking system. Example: NBFC (Non Banking Financial Companies). Companies which are not banks and provide financial leasing will also be mapped in this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide loans or leasing finance for automobiles.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing financing related to automobiles only.

l2_data.l2_name: Trading/ Capital Markets and Brokerage Firm
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in direct market gain from investment, proprietary trading, the provision of trading platforms and services to investors and brokers, and brokerage services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in providing trading/ brokerage services to investors/traders either through their site or platform. examples of such companies are Groww, Zerodha, Angel One, Upstox. The services will be securities trading/brokerage, equity derivates trading, commodity derivatives trading, margin and securities financing/trading, etc. Proprietary trading may involve the trading of stocks, bonds, commodities, currencies, or other instruments.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the trading of different currencies.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide foreign exchange (forex) trading services, i.e. trading in currencies only. Companies which do forec trading foe personal gains will also be mappped to this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the management and operation of financial exchanges and provide a marketplace where securities, commodities, derivatives, or other financial instruments can be traded.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that operate exchanges and provide exchange related services for eg BSE. Depositories such as CDSL and clearing corporations such as NSCCL will also be mapped to this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing financial, tax, accounting, and corporate data.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing financial, tax, accounting, and corporate data. Ex-Bloomberg, FactSet.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies which are involved in providing wealth and asset management services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in providing wealth and asset management services and portfolio management services to clients. Asset management and wealth management companies (Mutual fund companies) such as  UTI Asset mangement, HDFC Asset management etc will be mapped to this theme. Companies which invest pooled money of investors in funds created by them and earn dividends and investment management fee and distribute these dividends and profits among their investors will be mapped to this theme.

l2_data.l2_name: Real Estate Asset Management and Investment
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies engaged in real estate investment and portfolio management.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in real estate asset and portfolio management only. They invest pooled money of investors in real estate property portfolio only and earn management fee. These companies purchase any kind of real estate such as land, buildings etc and might lease them or sell to earn future monetary gains.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that invest in private companies and start-ups.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in buying equity stake in non listed companies such as start ups. Venture captal firms who buy stake in unlisted companies and also assist them with their operations to take deciaions and build a sucessful business will also be mapped to this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the business of investing the pooled capital of investors in financial securities. These companies do not include private equity and venture capital companies.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes holding companies which have stakes in other companies as well as their subsidiaries and earn return in investments. Companies which invest pooled money of investors to buy stake such as investment trusts will also be mapped to this theme. Holding companies eg: TATA SONS,

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide indexing solutions, namely index construction, maintenance, calculation, and so on.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide indexing solutions, such as index construction, maintenance, calculation, and so on. For eg: INDXX

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing credit information, analysis, and scores and seeks to cover companies that provide services related to credit risks and credit guarantees, including guarantee services against sales credit, contractor credit, guarantee services by the debtor's trust, guarantee services against advance payment credit, guarantee services related to company acquisition, and other types of financial guarantees. This also includes credit rating agencies.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing credit information, analysis, and scores. This classification seeks to cover companies that provide services related to credit risks and credit guarantees, including guarantee services against sales credit, contractor credit, guarantee services by the debtor's trust, guarantee services against advance payment credit, guarantee services related to company acquisition, and other types of financial guarantees. This also includes credit rating agencies. For eg: ICRA,FITCH

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are solely established to raise capital from investors for the purpose of acquiring one or more operating businesses. Companies with no commercial operations are known as SPAC, or blank check companies.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are listed solely for the purpose of affecting a merger/acquisition within 2 years of their listing. Such companies raise capitl from public without any business operations and  are bound to merge with or acquire any other company within 2 years.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide financial institutions with facilities to recover their debt.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing debt recovery/collection services to banks and other financial institutions.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in comprehensive management of the complete cash cycle, including cash transfer services and ATM management, primarily for financial institutions, businesses, government agencies, central banks, and so on.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in comprehensive management of the complete cash cycle, including cash transportation services and ATM management, mainly for financial institutions, businesses, government agencies, central banks, and so on. For eg: one such company is CMS.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the trading of commodities.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in commodity trading. Oil and gas exploration and mining companies which trade their commodity for financial gains in derivative market will also be included here.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing insurance services, as well as wealth and asset management. Companies will be mapped to this classification in cases of the unavailability of revenue bifurcation between these two services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in insurance underwriting and asset and wealth management and revenue bifurcation is not given.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide brokerage services as well as wealth and asset management. Companies will be mapped to this classification in cases of the unavailability of revenue bifurcation between these two services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in asset and wealth management along with brokerage services and revenue bifurcation is not given.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification cover a bank or other financial institution that provides credit card facilities.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are  involved in providing credit card facilities, Companies like VISA and Mastercard that provide credit card infrastructure, i.e. technology for credit card will not be mapped to this theme, only those companies which provide credit card such as BOB credit card will be mapped to this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that invest their own money in different businesses and generate interest or dividend income from them.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in earning revenue from finance or interest income of the company and source of these income is not specified or mentioned sometime. This is usually not the main segment or main business operation of the company, hence covered under Others L1 and Internal treasury L2. Ex- A company has put their income in bank and earning interest from it.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing fintech services and cannot be covered under the remaining themes.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which use innovative technologies to improve and automate financial services

l2_data.l2_name: Digital Payment Infrastructure and Services Providers
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer digital payment methods. This also includes prepaid cards, money transfer services, clearing houses, and point-of-sale infrastructure such as POS machines and payment gateways.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies we will cover companies which provide infrastructure to facilited a transaction, For example Visa, Mastercard. This will also cover those segment of companies which provide a platform to initiate the transaction apps like Bharatpe, phonepe.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide a form of financial technology that facilitates borrowing and lending through online platforms or websites.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which offer platform to provide p2p lending, example - 12% club

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer offline or online platforms for collecting funds from individual members to finance projects and businesses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide offline or online platforms for collecting funds from individual members to finance projects and businesses. These companies facilitate crowdfunding by enabling entrepreneurs, artists, and organizations to raise capital from a large number of small investors. They offer various types of crowdfunding models, such as reward-based, equity-based, and donation-based crowdfunding.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing services related to cryptocurrencies, namely crypto mining, crypto trading, and crypto wallets. This also includes companies that utilize blockchain technology to provide financial services. Companies that develop other alternative currencies are also eligible for inclusion.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide services related to cryptocurrencies, such as crypto mining, crypto trading, and crypto wallets. Additionally, it encompasses companies that utilize blockchain technology to offer financial services. Companies involved in the development of other alternative currencies are also part of this theme

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide short-term financing services that allow customers to make purchases and pay for them overtime after an initial payment.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are“buy now, pay later” (BNPL) is a form of lending with a distinct mode, often used for grocery shopping. It differs from credit cards and specialty finance. If a company offers loans and is a Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC), it falls under specialty finance. If a bank or NBFC offers credit cards, it maps to credit cards. Companies earning from BNPL, like Amazon Pay’s “Buy Now, Pay Later” segment, are categorized under BNPL.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing technology-enabled investment solutions. These companies develop personal finance software and provide robo-advisor solutions that leverage automation and algorithms. It does not include traditional fund administrators that provide technology services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which creates or provides a financial robo advisor for financial consultancy.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing any other insurance that cannot be covered under the remaining classification.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing any other insurance that can't be covered under the remaining classification. for example pet insurance, annuity.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide insurance that covers the insured's medical expenses due to illness in exchange for a premium amount.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide insurance that covers the insured's medical expenses due to illness in exchange for a premium amount.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing insurance to cover losses or damages related to life or accidental damages to policyholders.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing insurance to cover losses or damages related to life or due to accidental damages to policyholders.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide insurance to cover losses or damage to life and health.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide insurance to cover losses or damages related to life, health, or accidental damage to policyholders. It covers all three types of insurance, i.e., life, health, and accident.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies which are involved in providing insurance coverage for a wide range of risks excluding life insurance. It may include health, property, automobile, or any other non-life insurance.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing insurance coverage for a wide range of risks, excluding life insurance. It may include property, liability, automobile, or any other non-life insurance.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer commercial insurance.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide commercial insurance and reinsurance for crop protection, marine, property, or any other assets. It is generally given for businesses.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide insurance coverage for a vehicle's loss or damage.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that offer insurance coverage for loss or damage to any vehicle, such as a car, two-wheeler, commercial vehicle, etc. It also includes reinsurance for automobiles.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer insurance brokerage services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that either provide insurance brokerage services or underwrite third-party insurance on behalf of other insurance companies. This will also include banks that underwrite third-party insurance on behalf of third-party insurance companies.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide both life and non-life insurance.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing insurance coverage for a wide range of risks, including life insurance. It may include health, property, automobile, life/accident, or any other non-life insurance.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing insurance for personal property (cars, homes) and liability (personal or professional). Property insurance refers to your personal possessions, i.e., things you own. Casualty insurance, meanwhile, covers your legal responsibility for losses stemming from damage to another’s property by any means, such as theft, fire, or natural disaster.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies providing insurance for personal property (cars, homes) and liability (personal or professional). Property insurance refers to your personal possessions, i.e., things you own. Casualty insurance, meanwhile, covers your legal responsibility for losses stemming from damage to another’s property by any means, such as theft, fire, or natural disaster.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies which are involved in providing reinsurance services to insurance companies to divide the risk claim.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in  providing reinsurance services to insurance companies to divide the risk claim.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in the management, ownership, and leasing of retail properties, office buildings, or both.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are "REITs engaged in the ownership, operation, management, acquisition, and development of retail properties or office buildings. These properties encompass regional shopping malls, outlet centers, shopping centers, strip malls, power centers, and standalone retail properties. Retail properties includes malls,supermarket, discount store etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in owning and managing storage facilities and collecting rent from customers. Self-storage REITs rent space to both individuals and businesses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies are Self-storage REITs own and manage storage facilities, renting out space to individuals and businesses. These REITs generate income by collecting rent from their customers who use the storage units for various personal or business needs. self-storage REITs focus on providing flexible, smaller storage solutions for a wide range of customers, while warehouse REITs cater to businesses needing large-scale storage and distribution facilities.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITS, which are involved in owning and managing telecommunication towers, fiber cables, and wireless infrastructure.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies are Telecommunication REITs own and manage assets like telecommunication towers, fiber optic cables, and wireless infrastructure. They generate income by leasing these facilities to tenants, such as mobile network operators and internet service providers.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in owning, acquiring, and managing hotels, motels, luxury resorts, and business-class hotels, along with leasing out properties to guests.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies are Hotel REITs own, acquire, and manage properties such as hotels, motels, luxury resorts, and business-class hotels. They generate income by leasing rooms and spaces to guests.

l2_data.l2_name: Green Real Estate Investment Trusts (Green REITs)
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in owning, operating, and managing green buildings. Throughout their life cycle, these buildings design and construct themselves to be environmentally responsible, sustainable, and resource-efficient.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies are Green Building REITs own, operate, and manage environmentally responsible and sustainable buildings. These properties are designed to be resource-efficient throughout their entire life cycle. They typically focus on energy efficiency, renewable energy integration, and other green building practices

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in owning and managing various forms of residences and renting out space to tenants.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies are Residential REITs own and manage different types of housing properties and rent them out to tenants. These REITs specialize in various forms of residences, including apartment buildings, student housing, manufactured homes, and single-family homes.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in owning and managing a variety of health care-related real estate and collecting rent from tenants.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies are Healthcare REITs are Real Estate Investment Trusts that own, operate, and manage properties related to the healthcare industry. These properties can include:Senior Living Communities: Facilities that provide housing and care for elderly residents.Hospitals: Medical institutions offering a wide range of healthcare services.Medical Office Buildings: Offices for healthcare professionals and outpatient services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in owning and managing facilities that customers use to safely store data.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are Data Center REITs are Real Estate Investment Trusts that own, operate, and manage data center facilities. These facilities provide the infrastructure needed to house servers and other IT equipment, which are essential for storing, processing, and transmitting data. Data Center REITs generate income by leasing space within these facilities to various tenants, including tech companies, cloud service providers, and other businesses that require secure and reliable data storage

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which provide real estate financing by originating or purchasing mortgages or mortgage-backed securities.
l2_data.l2_treatment: Mortgage REITs (Real Estate Investment Trusts) are companies that lend money for real estate or invest in mortgages and earn income mainly from the interest on those loans. This theme includes companies which are mortgage reit we will take net interest income and if company is a mortgage reit and have other segments from where it is generating revneue from selling its npa those will under mortgage reit as well.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in the management, ownership, and leasing of industrial properties or warehouse properties.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are Industrial and Warehouse REITs are Real Estate Investment Trusts that focus on owning, operating, and managing properties used for industrial purposes. These properties include manufacturing facilities, distribution centre etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITS, which are involved in the acquisition, development, ownership, management, and leasing of properties other than residential, commercial, industrial, warehouse, and healthcare properties.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which areREITs that focus on acquiring, developing, owning, managing, and leasing properties such as timber facility and forest, gyms, agricultural land, and prisons. This category excludes industrial and warehouse, hotel, residential, data center, mortgage, self-storage, cell tower, green, healthcare, and commercial REITs.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in constructing, owning, operating, and managing any type of real estate building. These companies generate revenue by leasing and selling their properties to both individuals and businesses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are engaged in the real esate development and operation of own developed  properties. Also include companies which are in real estate development and construction related business in single segment and no bifucation is available.  Case 1: - Prince Housing & Development Corp

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies, firms, or agencies that act as a medium for buyers and sellers to get in touch with each other regarding real estate properties.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This themes includes companies, firms, or agencies that facilitate connections between buyers and sellers of real estate properties, these companies sometimes provide property management services as well so if we have separate segment of that we will map that segment to property management.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification encompasses companies engaged in real estate investment and property development, without providing a distinction between these services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are generating revenue through there real estate properties and  is a developer as well as investor and their portfolio is not defined.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in the management, ownership, and leasing of both commercial and industrial properties.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are reit  and investing into offices as well as manufacturing facility

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing real estate services and cannot be covered under the remaining classifications.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies are Companies that are involved in providing real estate services and can't be mapped under remaining classifications.Case-1 Company is into real estate developer and into property management with significant presence of both but revenue bifurcation is not available

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes REITs, which are involved in the management, ownership, and leasing of both commercial and residential properties.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that have aportfolio of managing both residential and commercial reit.Case-1 in a reit is investing in Hostels and labor homes it will be covered under this.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification covers real estate-related consulting services. A few examples of these services include valuation and appraisal review and management, portfolio or single asset valuation, arbitration and consulting, research, highest and best use studies, property tax reviews, and assistance with appeals and litigation.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies   which provides any consulting or value added service to real estate companies will mapped under this.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that develop or operate residential real estate properties.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that develop or operate residential real estate properties. Case 1: Cairn Homes Plc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in developing or operating real estate properties for commercial purposes, e.g., shopping malls, hotels, restaurants, etc. Note: Companies involved in only hotel development and operation will be covered in hotel and resort L2 only.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in developing or operating real estate properties for commercial purposes, e.g., shopping malls, hotels, restaurants, etc. Note: Companies involved in just hotel development and operation will be covered in hotel and resort L2 only. Case 1: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in developing or operating real estate properties for industrial purposes, e.g., logistics or warehouse properties.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in developing or operating real estate properties for industrial purposes, e.g., logistics or warehouse properties. Case 1: Idico Corp Jsc

l2_data.l2_name: Commercial and Residential Real Estate Developer
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that develop or operate real estate properties for commercial and residential purposes.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that develop or operate real estate properties for commercial and residential purposes. If the company is developing commercial, residential, industrial properties in single segment then will be included here as industrial can be covered in commerical. Case 1: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd

l2_data.l2_name: Commercial and Industrial Real Estate Developer
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that develop or operate real estate properties for commercial and industrial purposes.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that develop or operate real estate properties for commercial and industrial purposes.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies whose core business is not as a real estate developer or real estate investment portfolio holder but has some land and earns rental income from it or sells its property asset.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies whose core business is not as a real estate developer or real estate investment portfolio holder but has some land and earns rental income from it or sells its property asset. Case 1 : Fast Retailing Co Ltd

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing multiple energy-related services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are enaged in the diverse energy related business like oil and gas exploration, hydro power generation or energy infra related services in single theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in energy production and cannot be covered under the remaining classifications.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in energy production sector and cannot be covered under single or any other energy producer L2s. It also includes companies which produces energy and then sell it to third party distributor or government for distributing it to final consumers, they will not be mapped in utilitiesas in utilities we cover companies who only distribute to the final consumer. Case 1: Company is in multiple type of energy production or bifurcartion not given will be mapped in this theme

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the production and generation of hydroelectricity by hydroelectric plants or water sources.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production and generation of hydroelectricity through hydroelectric plants or water source.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the production and generation of wind energy through wind farms.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production and generation of wind energy through wind farms

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce heat energy from the earth, including but not limited to geothermal power plants and geothermal heat pumps.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production of heat energy from the earth including but not limited to geothermal power plant and geothermal heat pumps.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce energy from burning wood or any other organic matter, such as crop by-products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in producing energy from burning wood or any other organic matter like by-product of crops, any bioenergy source.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production of electricity by burning fuel like- Coal, LNG or any other substance.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the production of clean fuels, such as bio-diesel fuel, ethanol fuel, LNG, CNG, and the like. Excluding hydrogen fuel cells, natural gas, etc.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in the production of clean fuels or green fuels such as bio-diesel fuel, ethanol fuel, green hydrogen fuel etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce electricity from nuclear fission, nuclear decay, and nuclear fusion reactions.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production of electricity from nuclear fission, nuclear decay, and nuclear fusion reactions.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce electricity from solar plants.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production of electricity from Solar Energy

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the production of electricity from any renewable source, such as wind, solar, geothermal, or any other type of renewable source.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production of electricity from any renewable source such as wind, solar, geothermal or any other type of renewable source but revenue bifurcation is not given.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce electricity from nuclear and any other type of source.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production of electricity from nuclear and any other type of source, but revenue bifurcation is not present.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the production and generation of thermal and renewable energy, like wind farms, hydroelectric, solar, coal, gas, etc.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in production and generation of thermal & renewable energy like wind farm, hydro, solar, biomass etc. It doesn't include nuclear energy.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that are involved in providing operation & maintenance services to power plants, petrochemical plants, oil refineries and other energy related industries.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in operating and managing EV charging stations.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in operation of EV charging station

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies which are involved in manufacturing fuel dispensers or pumps for petrol, diesel, CNG, etc.
This classification includes companies which are involved in providing EV charging infra for both commercial and residential use.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing/operation of hydrogen fueling station and its related equipment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies which are involved in manufacturing and/or operating multiple kinds of refueling station.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing and/or operating multiple kind of refueling stations in single segment, they will be mapped in this theme. l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture water-related equipment. It also includes companies that provide infrastructure to water utilities.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in  production of water related equipment, also includes Companies which provide infrastructure to water utility companies. e.g. - Installation of water pipelines etc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide electricity to end consumers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in retail of electricity. Case 1: - FirstEnergy Corp: - company is engaged in generation of electricity and direct selling to its customers.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in grid operations for electricity transmission. l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in  the grid operations for the transmission of electricity. These companies deal with the management of electrical systems through the operation of the electric grids (also companies involved in providing infrastructure for distribution of electricity, like laying of electric cables, installing transformers etc).

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that engage in any service for the purpose of collecting, sorting, processing, or disposing of waste.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in ny service for the purpose Collecting, Sorting, Processing or Disposing of Waste Excluding - Wastewater.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide water to end consumers. It also includes companies dealing with water waste treatment and management.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in water supply to industries and households, will also include companies which are involved in waste water treatment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that distribute gas to end consumers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in gas distribution to households and industries. Gases like: CNG/ LPG etc. It also includes companies which are provding Gas Infrastructure.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the distribution of steam and heat to end consumers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme incldes companies that are involved in producing and distributing steam and heat to households and industries.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in conducting activities that are earth-friendly and promote sustainable development.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that areengaged in conducting activities that are earth friendly and for sustainable development, like carbon capture or eco-friendly products. It also includes companies involved in manufacture equipment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide utility services and cannot be included under the remaining theme.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This Theme includes Companies Involved in Supply electricity, Water, Steam, involved in operation of grid or any other type of utilities but revenue bifurcation is not given. Additionally, it includes companies which are providing services related to utilities but cannot be mapped in any other theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide energy management services, such as green energy certification, energy audits, energy management consulting, power supply management, and similar energy management-related services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies specializing in energy management services, offering solutions such as green energy certification, energy audits, energy management consulting, and power supply management and similar energy management related services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide midstream and downstream energy, as well as related services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in midstream / downstream cannot be covered under remaining themes.

l2_data.l2_name: Oil & Gas Storage and Pipeline Services
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide oil and gas storage, as well as transportation services via oil and gas pipelines.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in operation of oil and gas pipeline through which providing transportation services to third party. It also includes companies provides transportation as well storage service, but revenue bifurcation is not given

l2_data.l2_name: Oil & Gas Storage and Tanker Services
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide oil and gas storage, as well as transportation services via oil and gas tankers and containers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in providing oil and gas tanker storage services and include companies which are in transportation of oil and gas through vessels and tankers.

l2_data.l2_name: Refining/ Oil and Gas Products Distribution
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in oil and gas refining and distribution.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies which are engaged in business of crude oil refining, processsing and treatment. Also, include comapnies which are providing distribution/ storage related services and pipline distribution after refining when no bifurcation is given between oil and gas refining/ storage/ pipline or other distribution related services. Case 1: -Kelt Exploration Ltd - company in oil trating and other segment providing treating of oil services to third parties.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide oil and gas royalties.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in the business of generating royalty income from their oil and gas assets. Example: - Dorchester Minerals Lp

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in upstream energy.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includess companies enagaged in Upstream energy related business and cannot be covered under remaining themes. CASE 1- Dagang Nexchange Bhd- oil and gas exploration, production, sale of oil and gas related equipment and services, provision of engineering, technical support

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the initial process of searching for and extracting oil and gas.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in oil and gas resource development, expolaration (offshore/ onshore) and production of crude oil, NGLs and natural gas. Example: - Tamarack Valley Energy Ltd

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide the building facilities, installations, and equipment required by energy companies to run their operations.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in engineering, procurement, construction and installation of floating, production, storage and offloading systems for oil  and gas production such as FPSO, FSO and TLP. Example: - Modec Inc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing services like drilling and formation evaluation, well construction, and well servicing operations, including well strengthening and maintaining well fields.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in providing  Drilling and Evaluation services like  including managed pressure drilling, drilling services, wireline and drilling fluids. Also includes early well planning to reservoir management through innovative tools and expert engineering to optimize reservoir access and productivity. This comapnies not involved in whole oil and gas infra development perhapas provide services to run the oil and gas explorationa and production process smooth. Example: - Weatherford International Plc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing services to oil and gas exploration companies to analyze subsurface geological conditions in order to increase the potential of hydrocarbon-bearing wells.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes Companies which are involved in providing services to oil and gas exploration companies to analyse subsurface geological conditions to increase the potential of hydrocarbon bearing wells example logging services.  includess Seismic Data Acquisition/Processing. Logging and mud logging services which includess land and ocean project contracting and technical services for collection, monitoring, transmission, processing and interpretation and evaluation of wellbore oil and gas, geology and engineering information .Example: - Sinopec Oilfield Service Corp

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the process of extracting coal from the ground or from a mine.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes Companies which are involved in operation of coal pit/ mines. Example: - Citic Resources Holdings Ltd

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the process of extracting radioactive nuclear ore from the ground.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in the process of extraction of radioactive nuclear ore from the ground. E.g. - uranium, etc. also includes companies that are engaged in nuclear fuel, nuclear fuel components and services for the nuclear power industry. Example: -Energy Fuels Inc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing services to other businesses and helping those businesses run their operations more efficiently.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in providing other companies with services and products that help them in running their businesses. These theme can provide various service such as legal, consultancy, support, security in a single segment or such service or product which can't be covered in rest of the themes. Case 1: Aeon Delight Co Ltd- Support services segment provides Travel agency, housework support services, education and human resources in single segment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer consulting services in various fields, such as strategic and financial consulting, with the exception of IT and engineering consulting services, as well as auditing services to other businesses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide consulting services in any field like Strategic consulting, financial consulting except IT consulting and engineering consulting services or, auditing services to other businesses. Case 1: Alpha Financial Markets Consulting Plc this whole company is into financial consulting.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide testing and certification services to a variety of industries.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide testing, inspection and certification services to different industries or customers. Case 1: Acv Auctions Inc -Customer Assurance Revenue Segment generates revenue by providing our Go Green assurance to sellers on the condition of certain vehicles sold on the marketplace, which is considered a guarantee under GAAP. This assurance option is only available for Go Green sellers on qualifying vehicles for which we have prepared the vehicle condition report. Customer assurance revenue also includes revenue from other price guarantee products offered to sellers. Customer assurance revenue is measured based upon the fair value of the guarantees that we provide. We expect the fair value per vehicle assured to decrease over time as we continue to improve the quality of our inspection product, which in turn reduces the costs of satisfying such assurance.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing employment and training services, such as recruitment agencies. This also includes companies providing online recruitment services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme incules companies involved in providing employment & training services such as Recruitment agencies. Also includes companies providing online recruitment services such as Naukri.com etc. Case 1: Adecco Group Ag- Pure play into employment services, staffing services, permanent/ temporary staffing, recruitment services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer background screening services to other organizations.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in providing background screening services to other organization.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing business process outsourcing (BPO) services or knowledge process outsourcing (KPO) services for other businesses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide business process outsourcing (BPO)services or Knowledge process outsourcing (KPO) services for other business. Case 1: Accenture Plc- Outsourcing segment is into BPO services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer legal services. This also includes companies providing online legal services through their platform.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide Legal services. Also includes companies providing online legal services through their platform. Case 1: Legalzoom Com Inc- Pure play company of online legal services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer patent or licensing services to other businesses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide patent or licensing services to other businesses. They help their customers in filling patents and getting licenses. Case 1: ACACIA RESEARCH CORP- Intellectual property Operations is into patent licensing.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer security services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide security services. Ex- guard. Case 1: Aeon Delight Co Ltd- Security services segment provides security services and transport security services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer business support services to other businesses. This includes services that will help other businesses run their operations seamlessly and perfectly.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide business support services to other business. This includes services which will help other business to run their operations seamlessly and perfectly. Case 1: Advantage Solutions Inc /Ca/ is into business support services in sales segment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide engineering project expertise and guidance to businesses, as well as advise their clients on how to best meet their design and construction demands.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provides expertise and guidance to businesses on engineering projects and advises their clients on how to best meet their design and construction (engineering related construction and design only) demands. Case 1: Altair Engineering Inc- Client engineering services is into engineering consultancy services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing tech support services to other businesses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which tech support services to other business.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that engage in market research and publish those reports through various mediums.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that conduct market research services and deliver their findings to their clients through various mediums.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provides solutions to healthcare industry such as healthcare consulting, hospital management services etc and other support service to healthcare industry.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide data but exclude financial data providers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide data base built by them on a niche industry or topic and sell them to clients as packages, but excludes financial data providers. Example: Weathernews Inc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing professional services for planning, organizing, and executing events on behalf of their clients.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide professional services for planning, organizing, and executing events on behalf of their clients.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer assembly and manufacturing services to other businesses. The products can be from any industry or category.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in providing contract manufacturing services to other comapnies. this companies provide contract manufacturing services to different product or different industries. If company in single specified product contract manufacturing then this will be mapped according to specific product L2. Case 1: -  Aem Holdings Ltd - in contract manufacturing segment company is involved in Contract manufacturing of PCBA, Wire-Harness & Interconnect systems, Box Build so according to specific industry product it will cover under the "semiconductor product" L2.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing agriculture support services and products to farmers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide agriculture related support services and products such as farming land on rental basis, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing maintenance and repair services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide any kind of maintenance and repair services for any kind of machinery.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing post-disaster evacuation and training services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide post disaster evacuation services and training.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification encompasses companies that offer online platforms for price comparison services, generating revenue through lead generation (including pay per click), subscription revenue, and ad revenue from businesses listing on the platform.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provides online platforms for price comparison of services or products. Their revenue source is from lead generation (pay per click also inclusive here) or subscription revenue and ad revenue paid to them by the businesses for their business listing on the platform. Note: These companies are not involved in research they just act as a business search engine. Example: Justdail

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide tax services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that provides tax services through online/offline modes.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing and/or manufacturing weapons and weapon systems for defense and military purposes.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide technological solutions and use technology in warfare, aerospace, and defense.
l2_data.l2_treatment: this theme includes companies which are engaed in the manufacuturing of aerospace related defense product and technology which are new or under development/ initial phase in defense industry. like f innovative aerial systems and is engaged in development of military aviation technology. Example : - Saab Ab: - in Aeronautics segment company is enaged in the manufacturing of various tech related product for avaiation defense.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in manufacturing aerospace and defense components.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that produce or manufacture aerospace and defense components, such as spare parts for defense aircraft, military defense, and space.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in manufacturing firearms and ammunition.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing firearms and ammunition for defence, individuals, sports shooting, hunting, etc.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing defence aircraft for combat purposes such as Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL).

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture military-related apparel.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide naval defense-related products like ships, submarines, etc. This classification also includes companies that provide naval propulsion and auxiliary equipment, including main coolant pumps, power-dense compact motors, generators, steam turbines, valves, and secondary propulsion systems, primarily for naval defense. They also provide ship repair and maintenance for naval defense.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are providing naval defense-related products like ships, submarines, etc. This theme also includes companies that provide naval propulsion and auxiliary equipment, including main coolant pumps, power-dense compact motors, generators, steam turbines, valves, and secondary propulsion systems, primarily for naval defense. They also provide ship repair and maintenance for naval defense.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide defense-related products such as radar, satellites, and submarines. This classification also encompasses businesses that do not provide revenue splits.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in business of manufacturing defense related product like cameras, radars, mission critical sysytems, missiles, survillance drones, launchers, sensors, defense robots and much more also includes services related to this products. This theme doesn't include ships, groung vehicles, aircraft etc. Majorly used when various defense product come together but if a single product come then we first try to map it according to it's use like in ground,air and water defense. Example 1. Saab AB : - company in Surveillance segment provides airborne, ground-based and naval radar, electronic warfare, combat systems and C4I solutions.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing multi-industry industrial services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are enaged in the diverse multiple industry business like healthcare industry, industrial machinary, automobile etc in single theme.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are enaged in manufacturing of products/equipment/machinary for consumer and industrial both use then it will cover under this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide financial and non-financial services and products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are engaged in the finance and non finance sector both in single theme. Like in banking and industrial product in single theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture and distribute advanced batteries, fuel cells, hydrogen fuel cell batteries, and battery materials.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are dealing in the production and distribution of advanced batteries, fuel cells and Hydrogen fuel cell batteries for stationary, portable, and transportation. Inveter also cover under this theme excluding if they are only use for solar system.

Motors include different type of electrical motor run of AC and DC types induction, synchronous etc. Also includes related drivers and motor starters.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture electrical wires and cables.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are enagged in manufacturing of electrical wires and cables like power cables which are used for low voltage, mid voltage and high voltage electricity transmission. Also if a company is manufacturing electrical and optical cable in single segment then it will also cover under this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the manufacturing of energy equipment.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes Companies which involves into manufacturing of wind turbine generator and their parts like, Blade, Tower, Nacelle and Hub. Also include their installation related services only if in single segment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies which are involved in manufacturing of boilers, steam turbines, condenser, steam turbine generators, etc. for thermal power plants.
This classification includes companies which are involved in manufacturing Small Modular Reactors (SMRs), nuclear island, conventional(turbine) island, etc. for nuclear power generation.
This classification includes companies that distribute industrial machinery and related parts.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme  includes companies that are engaged in the distribution of Industrial machinery used for different purpose and its related parts.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that distribute industrial products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme  includes companies that are engaged in the distribution of industrial products such as moulds, nuts, etc.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that manufacture industrial machinery, products and parts, hvac, autonomous systems, solutions(may include services) etc all in single theme or any other industry related solutions/services which can't be covered in other themes.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in manufacturing, repairing, and maintaining the elevator, lifts, and escalators.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing robots and robotic automation products and services with a focus on industrial applications.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide robots and robotic automation products and services with a focus on industrial applications.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the development of technology for unmanned systems.

The theme will also include automobile technology companies providing electronics for enabling autonomous systems. Excluding autonomous vehicle and drone manufacturers. l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in manufacturing Alcoholic and Non-Alcoholic beverages, but revenue bifurcation is not given. Case 1: Ambev Sa- Some segments of these company is involved in both alcohol and non alcoholic beverage manufacturing.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that distribute agriculture and farm machinery.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme  includes companies that are engaged in the distribution of Agri and farm machinery such as tractor and other machines.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that distribute agricultural products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme  includes companies that are engaged in the distribution of agricultural products such as fertilizers, etc.

l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in multiple types of farming will mapped in this theme.Case 1- Company is in Crop Farming,Nuts Farming,Agriculture Milling etc will mapped in this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are into the farming and processing of grain and rice.
