l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the farming and cultivation of nuts.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in farming & cultivation of nuts such as almonds, cashew nuts etc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in vegetable farming and processing.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in farming and processing of vegetables (Mushrooms are not included)

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in tea plantation, farming, and cultivation.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in Farming and cultivation of tea plantation.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in coffee bean farming.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in farming of Coffee beans.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that farm and grow oil seed and oil seed plants.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in farming and growing of oil seed and Oil seed plants. Examples are- farming and plantation of palm, soyabean, mustard, sunflower, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in sugarcane cultivation and processing.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in Cultivation and processing of Sugarcane.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce seeds for the agriculture of various crops.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in production of seeds for agriculture of various crops such as Vegetable, pulses, Cereals etc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the process of cleaning, tempering, and grinding cereal grains into flour and other milled grain products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in the process of cleaning, tempering, and grinding cereal grains into flour and other milled grain products.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in cattle raising, breeding, or animal production. This category also includes companies that raise animals for the purpose of obtaining fiber or any other product.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in cattle raising and breeding or production of animal. Also includes companies which rear animal to procure fibre or any other product like-egg or meat out of them.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the raising, breeding, or production of animals or rear animals in order to procure fiber or any other product like egg or meat out of them, along with meat processing.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in cattle raising and breeding or production of animal or rear animal to procure fibre or any other product like-egg or meat out of them along with meat processing and revenue bifurcation is not provided.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in both edible and non-edible farming.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in edible and non-edible farming and revenue bifurcation is not provided.Case 1- company is in farming of fruits and cotton , revenue given in single segment will be mapped in this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture products from agricultural waste.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in manufacture products from agricultural waste like stems, branches, etc. Agricultural waste are all parts of crops that are not used for human or animal food.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in managing forests and providing forest-derived products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in managing forests and providing forest related products. Also includes companies which provide afforestation and deforestation services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce crops in gardens and greenhouses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in managing nurseries, gardens and greenhouses to grow fruits, vegetables, ornamental crops, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification included companies that are cultivating plants that are grown on a large scale commercially and harvested extensively. Cultivated plants such as wheat, grain, vegetables, and fruit are considered crops, animal feed (grass), etc., and revenue bifurcation is not given.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in ultivating plants that are grown on a large scale commercially and harvested extensively. Cultivated plants such as wheat, grain, vegetables, and fruit are considered crops, animal feed (grass), etc., and revenue bifurcation is not given.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in fruit and vegetable farming, but revenue bifurcation is not given.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in fruit and vegetable farming, but revenue bifurcation is not given.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in pulses farming.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies that  are involved in farming of pulses

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture food products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies engaged in food products business and cannot be mapped to remaining themes. It also includes companies involved in manufacturing food products and feed, but revenue bifurcation is not given.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in manufacturing any type of processed packaged food product.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme Includes companies involved in manufacturing any type of processed food such as frozen food, Snacks, Confectionery, Bakery, ready to eat meal etc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce unprocessed and minimally processed packaged food products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in producing unprocessed and minimally processed packaged food products. for example vegetables

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture processed meat products, such as bacon, ham, sausages, salami, corned beef, jerky, hot dogs, lunch meat, canned meat, chicken nuggets, and other foods however, it primarily focuses on the meat processing industry and does not offer revenue bifurcation.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are engaged in the manufacturing of processed and packaged meat product like patties, sausages, nuggets and meat balls etc. Also, includes companies which are in animal husbandary and selling own processed and packaged meat product or  any other food product and revenue bifurcation is not available. Case 1: - Pt Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Tbk - Company is engaged in the animal husbandry and selling  Processed Chicken where proper segment of processed meat is not available.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce milk-based goods like cheese, yoghurt, condensed milk, kefir, ice cream, butter, non-alcoholic beverages and infant formulas.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are engaged into manufacturing of milk based products such as cheese ,yogurt etc. Additionally, it covers companies which are manufacturing dairy products and beverages in a single segment and revenue bifuration is not available.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in retailing a general range of food products, which may be fresh or packaged for everyday usage.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that primarily retails a general range of food products which may be fresh or packaged in everyday usage. In this theme we will not include companies which are into manufacturing of food and beverages.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture edible oil.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include companies enaged in the food oil producing . This theme also includes comapnies which are in farming and then selling food oil

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture food and beverage additives, preservatives, colors, and flavors.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes Companies engaged in the manufacturing of food and beverages additives, preservatives, colours, and flavours.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the food distribution business.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies engaged in food distribution(wholeselling) business

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture food and non-alcoholic beverages.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme incudes companies involved in manufacturing of food and Non-alcoholic beverages, but revenue bifurcation is not given

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in manufacturing food and dairy products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in manufacturing food and dairy product, but revenue bifurcation is not given for example ice-cream and Snacks, Confectionery are given under one segment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in manufacturing food and nutritional products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in manufacturing food and nutritional products, but revenue bifurcation is not given

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in manufacturing condiments/spices.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are engaged in manufacturing condiments/spices.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in manufacturing processed meat and condiments.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in manufacturing processed meat and condiments, but revenue bifurcation is not given

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing food products and alcoholic beverages in a single segment.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide food products and alcoholic beverage in a single segment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer both processed and unprocessed food in a single segment.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that offer both processed and unprocessed food in a single segment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce non-edible crops.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme include company producing nonedible crop products. For example- Rubber, Cotton, Jute , Bamboo etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the farming and cultivation of flowers and ornamental plants.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme Includes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Flowers and ornamental plants. For - Example- Rose, Lily , Jasmine

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in rubber farming and cultivation.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Rubber.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies engaged in cotton farming and cultivation.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme Includes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Cotton.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that engage in bamboo farming and cultivation.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes Companies that are involved in farming and cultivation of Bamboo.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in jute farming and cultivation.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This themeIncludes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Jute.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture tabaco and cigarette products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are engaged in manufacturing of tobacco and cigarette products such as cigarettes, cigars etc. This theme also include devices used for smoking like- Vape, Hookah etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the retailing of any tobacco or cigarette products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are retailing any tobacco or cigarette products. like companies revenue completely received from retailing of these product.This theme also include retailing of devices used for smoking like- Vape, Hookah etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies engaged in tobacco farming and processing.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are into farming and processing of tobacco. Case 1 -Company earning revenue from farming of tobacco will mapped in these theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies engaged in tobacco cultivation and processing, as well as other agricultural activities.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are into farming and processing of tobacco and farming of other products and revenue given in single segment. Case 1- Company having farming business of tobacco and vegetables and revenue given in single segment will be mapped in this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing telecommunication-related services and products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide telecommunication services and cannot be mapped to any of themes. If a company is providing voice call services and data services in same segment than will be covered here.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer broadband and internet services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are providing internet services either through wires (broadband & Wi-Fi), satellite internet, communication towers (Mobile internet) or any other mode. Case 1: 1&1 Ag-  Access services revenue is derived from broadband/ internet services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide DTH and cable services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are providing DTH/ Cable TV services. Case 1: Bharti Airtel Ltd: Digital tv services is into dth/ cable services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer telecommunication infrastructure services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This includes companies providing infrastructural services to telecom companies like communication tower services, telephone & internet wire services etc. They sell and also provide installation of the towers and other infrastructure related to telecommunication. Case 1: Cellnex Telecom Sa- Pure play company of telecom infra.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that sell retail telecommunication equipment.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are retailing or selling telecom equipment like routers, modems, multiplexers, switches, etc. Case 1: 1&1 Ag- Hardware sales is of retailing telecom equipments.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing ICT products and services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing ICT products and services, basically electronics products for consumer, communication and IT industry also inculdes IT services if revenue bifurcation is not available. Case 1: Bt Group Plc- ICT and manged networks segment is into ICT services and products.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification encompasses companies in the media and telecommunications industries.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes which are enaged in the media and teclecom rletaed services and product in single theme. Like media brodcating , production, telecom equipment manufacturing,telecom services in single thme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing media broadcasting, advertisements, and related services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are into media broadcasting and advertisement and cannot be mapped to remaining themes. If a company is into media broadcasting and also earns advertising revenue in same segment then will be covered here.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer media broadcasting services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are into media broadcasting. Such as Television channels' broadcasting revenue.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide digital spaces for advertisements.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which generates revenue by renting out their digital space for internet-based advertisement. These companies usually operate a website/app or a digital platform and rent out advertisement time slotand earn revenue which is classified as digital ad space revenue.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes businesses that provide marketing and advertising services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide marketing and advertisement services. These includes advertising agencies and no mode of advertisment is given. Also if no des is present but it is clear that revenue is from some sort of advertisement than can be covered in this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that operate a production house for the entertainment industry.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are operating as production house for entertainment industry. Also earning revenue from selling rights of movies and animation media content. VFX and animation companies also cover under this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing PR and marketing agency services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide public relations maintaining services for its individual and brand clients, they handle marketing of their clients. Case 1: They could also help their clients in licensing their IPs for better deals and returns.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in various omnichannel advertisements, such as print, digital, and social media platforms, radio and podcasts, event advertising, and so on.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies involved in renting of various kind modes of be it digital/outdoor/indoor advertisements like print, digital & social media platforms, radio & podcasts, event advertising, etc. These companies doesn't design ads or are not responsible for customer acquisition they just renting spaces.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in digital outdoor advertising businesses like streets and squares, in railway stations, at airports, in shopping centers, in the mountains, and in and around public transport.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This includes companies that are involved in digital outdoor advertising business like streets and squares, in railway stations, at airports, in shopping centres, in the mountains, and in and around public transport.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in digital marketing services like social media marketing, chatbot marketing, influencer marketing, content marketing, pay-per-click (PPC), search engine marketing, etc. (excluding digital ad space).
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which provide Digital marketing services like, Social media marketing, Chatbot marketing, Influencer marketing, Content marketing, Pay-per-click (PPC), search engine marketing etc. (Except Digital Ad space).

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that rent out their spaces for advertising, such as billboards and walls, but whose main business is not marketing or advertising.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that rent out their spaces for advertising, such as billboards and walls, but whose main business is not marketing or advertising.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide royalty, licensing, and franchises of media content, media rights, media platforms, media services, and so on.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are receiving royalty from media like music, albums, movie etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer publishing and related services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in general publishing services of all kinds and cannot be mapped to remaining theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing newspaper and magazine publishing services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in newspaper and magazine publishing such as Times of India, the Hindu etc,

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide educational and other publishing services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in developing, providing, and publishing educational content, including but not limited to companies providing digital content for test preparations, language learning courses, and traditional and interactive e-textbooks for purchase or rental.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes businesses that provide printing services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing printing services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer online publishing services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: this theme includes companies that are involved in publishing onling, books, magazines, newsletters etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture telecommunications hardware and software.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which manufacture telecommunication hardware and software and cannot be mapped in any of the themes.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture telecommunications equipment.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are into manufacturing of telecom equipment like routers, modems, multiplexers, switches, etc.

l2_data.l2_name: Network Testing & Validation Equipment and Software
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer network testing and validation services, as well as network management software.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are manufacturing network testing equipment or providing network testing services. Also includes companies which provide network management software and related services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture and provide hardware and systems related to data centers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which manufacture hardware device and system such as servers used for different purpose.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that actively explore and use very recent and emerging technologies and provide related services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing deep tech or emerging technology which are used for different purpose and have their application in different industries.

l2_data.l2_name: Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence Services
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing machine learning and artificial intelligence services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing machine learning and artificial intelligence services to make it easier to build, train, deploy, and manage custom learning models. ML and AI are modern technologies that are used in a wide range of activities. AI and ML can also be deployed using software and they will mapped in this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing services related to AR, VR, and XR.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing services related to Augmented Reality (AR), Virtual Reality (VR), Mixed Reality (MR) and everything in between. These companies aim to include all these technologies under a single platform to enhance the technological experience and provide related services of these.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide blockchain technology-related services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are invovled in providing services related to blockchain technology which allows transparent information sharing within the business. They connect digital economy through different platforms for crypto currency.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing quantum computing services to solve complex problems.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing quantum computing services (using specialized technology) that harnesses the laws of quantum mechanics to solve problems too complex for classical computers. They are based on quantum theory

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide light detection and ranging services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing services related to light detection and ranging. It also includes companies that provide related sensors, technology, autonomy enabling software solutions for LiDAR.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer ADAS technology.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing ADAS tech for the automobile sector. These kinds of companies specially deal in ADAS technology only which stands for Advanced driver assistance systems. It includes night vision, driver alertness and adaptive cruise control.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the development or provision of software and solutions that help enterprises streamline their operations.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are invovled in providing or developing software and solutions which helps enterprises streamline operations , so that they can easily manage their business operations through the software. Some examples include customer relationship management software, project management software, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the development or provision of software that caters to the needs of the finance industry.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing or developing a particular software program which is based on the finance sector. It includes budget management software, banking software, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies involved in the development or provision of software that caters to HR needs.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing or developing software which cater to the needs of the HR. Some functions of these software include organizing employees, streamlining work, automating tasks, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the development or provision of software that caters to the needs of the healthcare industry.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing or developing healthcare software which is based on the needs of the healthcare industry. For example, record management, patient management software and others.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that develop or provide software solutions to improve supply chain operations.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing or developing software solutions to improve parts of the supply chain, from harvesting to delivery to grocery stores, supermarkets, and other retail markets. This includes software services and analytics platforms to enable faster transportation and distribution and optimize logistics and operations. The main motive of this software is to improve the supply chain process by improving parts, providing services, optimizing logistics operations, faster transportation, and other related activities.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the development or provision of industry-specific software.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing or developing the software which helps in the end-to-end specific operations of the client or of any organization. This is used only when the software can be used for a particular industry. For instance, software for hotel management.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies which provide IT services but cannot be mapped to remaining themes.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing IT services that are used for different purposes and allows to access the tools through which operational process and daily tasks can be done easily. It also includes companies that provide different type of IT services along with their software.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide advisory services and consulting related to IT, DX, etc.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing advisory or consulting through IT or any other software. These types of consulting services are mostly related to IT field. They only provide consulting services and is not involved in their further process. It also includes security consulting, automation services.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide cyber security services to other companies.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing penetration testing and other cyber security services to assess the security of a system or a network.T This is done as part of the IT services which also includes companies which manage the security of another organisation's network.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide on-demand resources via the cloud.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing on-demand access to cloud-hosted physical and virtual servers, storage and networking - the backend IT infrastructure for running applications and workloads in the cloud. In this, the company manages server hardware, virtualization layers, storage, and networks whereas the client deals with the application software.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing a cloud environment to build, run, and manage applications.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involed in providing on-demand access to a complete, ready-to-use, cloud-hosted platform for developing, running, maintaining, and managing applications. In this, application software is also included in this.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing direct-use cloud-based software.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing cloud-hosted, ready-to-use application software. Users pay a monthly or annual fee to use a complete application from within a web browser, desktop client or mobile app. The application and all the infrastructure required to deliver it - servers, storage, networking, middleware, application software, data storage - are hosted and managed by the SaaS vendor.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing a cloud-based database.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing service that lets users access and use a cloud database system without purchasing and setting up their own hardware, installing their own database software, or managing the database themselves.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing multiple cloud services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing on-demand availability of computer system resources, especially data storage and computing power, without direct active management by the user. Cloud services are application and infrastructure resources that exist on the Internet. Third-party providers contract with subscribers for these services, allowing customers to leverage powerful computing resources without having to purchase or maintain hardware and software.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer digital distribution services through their app or platform.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing digital distribution services through their mobile app which can be downloaded on the OS or an online platform. Examples include Google play store services, Apple Store, Oceanofgames, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that operate and provide data center services to cloud computing companies.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in operating data centers. This includes all the implementation, maintenance, and operation of a data center. As such, data center services can involve hardware, software, processes, and personnel. They are responsible for providing IT organizations with data backup and recovery, networking, website hosting, data management and more.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer royalties, licensing, and franchising for technological products and software.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are receiving royalty for technology.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that distribute semiconductors and related products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are engaged in the distribution of semiconductor products such as wafer, ICs

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing a range of semiconductor technologies. It also includes companies that manufacture equipment for the semiconductor industry.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide a wide range of semiconductor solutions, such as machines (manufacturing and testing both), also this include companies selling/ licensing IPs related to semiconductor but if the IP is of a particular product for which we have a theme such as ICs IPs then it will be covered in product specific theme. Note: Royalty revenue if given seperately then is not included in this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide semiconductor-related services using their own technology.

Also includes company  that provides testing/packaging/assembly/supply services of semiconductor products.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture integrated circuits.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which are involved in manufacturing of ICs such as memory chips, micro processing units, etc. Photomasks for semiconductors are also included if no bifurcation between IC and photomasks is given.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that produce semiconductor raw materials.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that manufacture semiconductor raw materials and boards such as wafers, PCBs, photomasks, and so on.

l2_data.l2_name: Solar Cells & Panels Manufacturer and Supplier
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the manufacturing of solar cells, solar panels, and other solar energy-related materials.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes comapanies that are involded in manufacturing solar cells, solar panels, modules, polysilicon, and other materials related to solar energy.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture electronic parts and components.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of electronic parts and components such as sensors, displays, Vacuum tubes (valves), Discharge devices, Antennas, Resistors, Capacitors, Magnetic (inductive) devices, Protection devices, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture multi-purpose electronic materials.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes comapneis that are involved in manufacturing of electronic material such as Liquid Films, Dielectric Material, Nanocrystalline Material etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture semiconductor products and services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that provide semiconductor products,equipments, and provides services like testing, packaging or contract manufacturing in single segment  and anything else that doesn't fit into the other themes.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the manufacturing of electronic equipment, components, and materials.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme inclides companies that are involved in manufacturing of electronic equipment, components, and material and no bifurcation is present between them.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies engaged in the design and manufacturing of integrated circuits for data centers, such as those for accelerated computing and artificial intelligence (AI). The field encompasses the development of cockpits, autonomous driving, autonomous vehicle solutions, and electric vehicle computing.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing integrated circuits for Data Center (e.g. for accelerated computing) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) e.g. Cockpit, Autonomous driving development, and autonomous vehicle solutions, electric vehicle computing. Case 1: Nvidia

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that design and manufacture computer chips that generate graphics and images through swift mathematical computations, specifically for gaming and PC applications.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing computer chips that render graphics and images by performing rapid mathematical calculations to be used for graphics purposes e.g. for Gaming, PCs etc. Case 1: Nividia

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture equipment for semiconductor manufacturing, as well as those that produce semiconductor cleaning equipment. (Example: lithography machines.)
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of equipment used in semiconductor manufacturing process, including semiconductor cleaning equipment used during manufacturing of electronics. (Example- lithography machines)

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture transistors and capacitors.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of Transistor and Capacitor.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that develop and manufacture sensor solutions and technologies such as gas and liquid flow sensors, differential pressure sensors, and environmental sensors for humidity and temperature measurement.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in developing and manufacturing of sensor solutions / technology like, moisture sensor, motion sensors and environmental sensors for the measurement of humidity and temperature etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that design and manufacture electronic connectors such as coaxial connectors and multi-pin connectors.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in designing and manufacturing of electronic connectors like coaxial connectors, multi-pin connectors specific to electronic industry usage.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture audio components for microphones, speakers, and audio solutions.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of audio component for microphones, speakers and audio solutions.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture LED display panels, LCD monitors, and display modules, among other products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that produce LED display panels, LCD monitors, and display modules. Doesn't include touch module if it is not specific to display panels usage.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture resistors or other resistance components, such as thermistors.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of resistors or other resistance components such as thermistor.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture optronic, photonic, optical lens, and laser devices. It does not include optical fibers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that manufacture optronic, photonic, optical lens, and laser devices. Includes optical fibres only when bifurcation is not present.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture modules, e.g., cooling modules and camera modules.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of modules ex. cooling module, camera module etc. Also includes touch module if not specifically mentioned that are used in display devices only.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture inductors, wire-wound inductors, and transformers.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of inductors, wire wound inductor and also includes electronic transformers.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture optical fiber cables.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of  optical fiber cables.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture electronic power supplies, such as ac-dc converter power supplies, and so on.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in manufacturing of  electronic power supplies such as ac-dc converter power supply etc

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the distribution of hardware, software, and related products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are engaged in the distribution of hardware and software and their related peripherals such as computer, its parts and related software

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that develop and provide various types of software and software-related services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing different type of software whose particular operation is not available. For example software for any purpose.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing software development services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing software development services where companies only develop software for third party and they earn revenue from developing software. They design, build, develop and deploy the software using different tools.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in developing or providing cybersecurity software.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in developing or providing cybersecurity software such as anti-virus software, malware protection software, etc that used for the purpose of safety and security.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in developing, providing, and maintaining a virtual desktop environment.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing virtual desktop like environment for others through their online software platform. For example, AnyDesk is the virtual desktop environment.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in developing or providing a collaborative platform or software that enables individuals or organizations to connect over the internet.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing a platform through which collaboration can be done over the internet. For example, Zoom and Webex are the perfect example for these types of platforms.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that develop or provide software that enables organizations or individuals to analyze and extract valuable insights from data.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are invovled in providing data and analytics software which is used for the purpose of gaining insight or extract necessary information. For example, Tableau, Power BI and RapidMiner.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer software or a game development platform.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing gaming software through which others can access their software to desgin and make their software. In this, they only provide their software for gaming purpose. For example, Unity, Unreal Engine, BuildBox

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer website or app development platforms, as well as web hosting or app hosting services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing the development of the website and applications. Further, companies that provide hosting services such as GoDaddy.com is an example of this because they provide domain hosting services. It also includes add-ons and integrations available on the web development platform.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in developing or providing operating systems.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing any type of operating software such as Linux, real time OS.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in developing or providing tools to automate and manage ad campaigns.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing or developing toos through which ad campaigns can be made and engage in ad management activities.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in game development and/or game development services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing or developing the game and provide game development services. For example, GameLoft

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that develop or provide software and related hardware.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing hardware and software both together which are used for different purpose. It includes companies whose software and hardware have different applications.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide multiple types of software in a single segment, such as data analytics software and cybersecurity software in the same segment. Additionally, this classification will map industry-specific software and other types of software within a single segment.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing different types of software together that have different applications and are used for different purposes.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that provide biometrics and related software that are used in different industries.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are invovled in providing biometric and its related software which is used for the purpose of the identification or authentication.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies which are involved in developing/providing software or platforms for designing, layout etc. for a single or multiple industries.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in developing/providing software or platform for designing, layout, etc for a single or multiple industries in single segment. Ex. AutoCAD etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture consumer IoT products.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that develop and provide IoT products and services for consumer applications, with a focus on developing innovative solutions, including but not limited to smart security and smart home solutions. This segment excludes companies that use IoT solutions as a minor component or value-added feature in their products.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture light bulbs and lighting fixtures for multiple uses.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that manufacture lighting fixtures and light bulbs used in residential, public, commercial, and industrial environments. This theme encompasses all types and configurations of indoor and outdoor fixtures, as well as incandescent, fluorescent, and halogen bulbs, with the exception of LED lights.

l2_data.l2_name: Energy Efficient Advanced Products and Components
l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture electric components and materials with the goal of providing an energy-efficient solution.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in developing electric or electronic components and materials aimed at providing efficient energy solutions. Materials include silicon, lithium, superconductors, and LEDs.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in the manufacturing, maintenance, installation, and monitoring of security systems.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are manufacturing, distributing, installing, maintaining, and monitoring security systems for homes and businesses. Examples of these systems include boom barriers, tire killers, wedge barriers, and CCTV cameras, among others.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture consumer electronics goods.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that manufacture electronic consumer goods such as VR headsets, headphones, and so on.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture computers and computer peripherals.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that manufacture computers and computer peripherals, such as desktop systems, tablets, mice, keyboards, and so on.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture mobile phones.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that manufacture smartphones and mobile devices.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that manufacture automatic identification systems.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies providing automation solutions, such as RFID, AIDC products, barcode readers, etc.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer audio products that enable the recording, delivery, and playback of immersive high-definition audio.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that offer audio products that enable the recording, delivery, and playback of immersive high-definition audio.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that offer a variety of consumer goods technologies without providing revenue bifurcation.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that offer electronic goods and cannot be mapped in any other theme or  a variety of consumer goods technologies without providing revenue bifurcation.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that engage in the manufacturing of lime or limestone. This classification excludes companies that do not quarry or mine lime.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in providing drilling and blasting, in-pit grade control, exploration drilling and earthmoving, and mining support services.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies that are involved in providing mining field services such as drilling and blasting, in-pit grade control, exploration, drilling and earthmoving and Mining support services. Companies which provide mining related services to other mining and exploration companies will be mapped to this theme.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that are involved in both metal and non-metal mining and exploration. For example, mining copper and limestone together.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that receive royalties from mining activities.

l2_data.l2_description: This classification includes companies that perform more than one business operation under a single segment named 'Others or Other Business, and all business operations are related to different L2s.
l2_data.l2_treatment: This theme includes companies which  are involved in  different business in single segment or segment such as corporate and cannot be mapped to any L2. Ex-In most cases we consider corporate and other segmetn in Others L2 .

l2_data.l2_description: This classification cover the company's unallocated, intersegment, adjustment, intercompany, corporate, and intersegment and reconciliation segments.
